webchem v1.1.1
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Return a list of all possible ids

Source: R/cts.R
cts_to.Rd

Return a list of all possible ids that can be used in the 'to' argument

cts_to(verbose = getOption("verbose"))

Arguments

verbose

logical; should a verbose output be printed on the console?

Value

a character vector.

Details

See also http://cts.fiehnlab.ucdavis.edu/services

References

Wohlgemuth, G., P. K. Haldiya, E. Willighagen, T. Kind, and O. Fiehn 2010The Chemical Translation Service -- a Web-Based Tool to Improve Standardization of Metabolomic Reports. Bioinformatics 26(20): 2647–2648.

See also

cts_convert

Examples

# \donttest{
cts_from()

#>   [1] "biocyc"                                                                                                                                     
#>   [2] "cas"                                                                                                                                        
#>   [3] "chebi"                                                                                                                                      
#>   [4] "chemical name"                                                                                                                              
#>   [5] "human metabolome database"                                                                                                                  
#>   [6] "inchikey"                                                                                                                                   
#>   [7] "kegg"                                                                                                                                       
#>   [8] "lmsd"                                                                                                                                       
#>   [9] "lipidmaps"                                                                                                                                  
#>  [10] "pubchem cid"                                                                                                                                
#>  [11] "pubchem sid"                                                                                                                                
#>  [12] "chemspider"                                                                                                                                 
#>  [13] "chemdb"                                                                                                                                     
#>  [14] "chembl"                                                                                                                                     
#>  [15] "chembank"                                                                                                                                   
#>  [16] "zinc"                                                                                                                                       
#>  [17] "broad institute"                                                                                                                            
#>  [18] "the scripps research institute molecular screening center"                                                                                  
#>  [19] "drugbank"                                                                                                                                   
#>  [20] "mmdb"                                                                                                                                       
#>  [21] "chemmol"                                                                                                                                    
#>  [22] "niaid"                                                                                                                                      
#>  [23] "southern research institute"                                                                                                                
#>  [24] "nih clinical collection"                                                                                                                    
#>  [25] "comparative toxicogenomics database"
